title: Part 2 – Question-Réponse : le déménagement de bureau
instructions: Écoutez la question et les trois réponses possibles. Choisissez la réponse la plus appropriée.
audioText: Do you know if the marketing team has already moved to the new office? (A) They moved in last Monday. (B) The new office is on the fifth floor. (C) Marketing is working on a new campaign.

choices: The new office is on the fifth floor.
Marketing is working on a new campaign.
questions.explanation: Question fermée sur un événement passé. (A) confirme et précise la date. (B) répond à "Where", (C) est hors sujet.
